title: Evidence Media Service
subtitle: Large files and stale metadata are breaking evidence retrieval
objective: Pick the right storage type for large objects and wire metadata update flow correctly.
constraints: Use storage suitable for large binary files
Propagate metadata updates through async processing

concepts.title: Correct Storage Choice
concepts.description: Blob storage is preferred for media objects.

concepts.title: Async Metadata Pipeline
concepts.description: Queue + worker decouple metadata updates from request path.

concepts.title: Fast Delivery
concepts.description: CDN or cache should help serve frequently accessed evidence.
